customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety. No skepticism, no competing quotes raised as a barrier, no financial stress disclosed. The main risk is not customer anxiety but structural gaps in the setter's qualification work.
unresolved_concerns: Utility company not captured — Eugene's response at 01:45 ('Not yet' / 'Not me') was incoherent and Carter did not follow up. Closer should confirm utility provider at the start of the appointment.
Prior solar design acknowledged (02:47) but not explored — who provided it, what it showed, and Eugene's reaction are all unknown. Closer should surface this early to understand competitive context.
Identity and role of 'Donna' (referenced at 06:43) is unknown — may be a household member. Closer should confirm who else lives in the home and whether anyone else is involved in the decision.
sensitive_topics_raised: Eugene moved in February — relatively new to the home and may not have full bill history or established utility patterns.
exact_promises_rep_made: Monday at 10AM appointment, blocked for one hour.
Text confirmation sent after the call.
closer_should_know: Eugene is a genuinely engaged lead — cooperative throughout, confirmed solar interest immediately, and asked an unprompted question about the tax incentive at 03:55.
